name: io.github.ribato22/baton
title: Baton
description: Multi-model AI orchestration: plan a task DAG, route each task to the best capable model.

environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to use your Claude Code subscription CLI (claude -p) as a provider.

environmentVariables.name: CODEX_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to use your Codex CLI (codex exec) as a provider.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Card-billed Anthropic API key (optional; alternative/addition to the subscription CLIs).

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_COMPAT_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (Gemini / Groq / OpenRouter / DeepSeek / Ollama).
